description: Seed benchmark for document evidence retrieval over indexed paper metadata and structured cards.

papers.title: Sparse Retrieval for Transformer Agents
papers.abstract: We study retrieval-aware memory routing for transformer agents and show that sparse retrieval improves latency without collapsing answer quality.

structured_card.method: A sparse retrieval memory routing strategy chooses a compact evidence set before generation.
findings: Retrieval-aware routing reduces latency on long-context tasks.
Answer quality remains stable when the evidence set stays compact.
structured_card.limitations: The v1 system only indexes metadata-derived text instead of full PDF evidence.

papers.title: Graph Retrieval Routers for Research Workflows
papers.abstract: We route research queries through graph-structured retrieval paths and improve evidence selection for workflow orchestration.

structured_card.method: Graph retrieval routing adds query decomposition and path scoring before evidence ranking.
findings: Graph-based routing improves evidence precision for multi-hop research questions.
structured_card.limitations: Latency increases when path expansion is unbounded.
